speaker: speaker1
text: I ’ m going to be moving out soon .

speaker: speaker2
text: You still have time on your lease .

speaker: speaker1
text: There ’ s no way that I can stay here .

speaker: speaker2
text: That ’ s not going to be all right .

speaker: speaker2
text: I ’ m going to have to keep your deposit

speaker: speaker1
text: Why can ’ t I have it back ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Because you ’ re leaving before your lease is over .

speaker: speaker1
text: You have to give it back to me .

speaker: speaker2
text: You ’ re not going to get it .

speaker: speaker1
text: But I ’ m not able to live here anymore .

speaker: speaker2
text: I can ’ t help you with that .
